zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Goodale於1560年出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，她的父親John Goodale21歲，母親Elizabeth Taylor20歲。她於1582年8月12日與Henry Kilham在英國素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年7月14日在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可丹寧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Goodale于1560年出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，她的父亲John Goodale21岁，母亲Elizabeth Taylor20岁。她于1582年8月12日与Henry Kilham在英国素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年7月14日在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可丹寧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Goodale was born in 1560, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, her father, John Goodale, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Taylor, was 20. She married Henry Kilham on 12 August 1582, in Dennington, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 July 1624, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Dennington, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Goodale est née en 1560, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Goodale, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Taylor, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Kilham le 12 août 1582, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1624, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Goodale 1560 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Goodale 21 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Taylor 20. Sie hat am 12. August 1582 in Dennington, Suffolk, England Henry Kilham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1624 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dennington, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Goodale è nata il nel 1560 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Goodale, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Taylor, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Henry Kilham il 12 agosto 1582, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1624, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Dennington, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Goodaleが1560年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父John Goodaleは21歳，母Elizabeth Taylorは20歳であった。1582年8月12日にイギリススフォルクデニントンでHenry Kilhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1624年7月14日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクデニントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Goodale(이)가 1560년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Goodale(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Taylor(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1582년 8월 12일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Henry Kilham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 7월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Goodale nasceu em 1560, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Goodale, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Taylor, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Kilham em 12 de agosto de 1582, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1624, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Goodale родилась в 1560 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Goodale было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Taylor, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Kilham 12 августа 1582 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 июля 1624 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Goodale nació en 1560, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Goodale, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Taylor, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Henry Kilham el 12 de agosto de 1582, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1624, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
